summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Player Social Suite (Iteration 2). Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All social features tested and working correctly - Player Search, Player Profile, Follow/Unfollow toggle, Chat messaging. Full flow from registration to sending messages verified.

ui_bugs.issue: The data-testid attribute is not being rendered to DOM in React Native Web. This makes automated testing harder but does not affect functionality. The send button works correctly when clicked via coordinates.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add testID to data-testid conversion for React Native Web to improve automated testing. See: https://reactnative.dev/docs/testing#displayname
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Player Social Suite APIs are well implemented with proper validation (self-follow/self-message protection, message length limits)
Chat auto-cleanup for 7-day old messages is implemented in conversations endpoint
Frontend uses AsyncStorage correctly for user ID persistence
All interactive elements are using TouchableOpacity with proper onPress handlers
data-testid props are set but not rendered to DOM in web version (common React Native Web limitation)
test_credentials: Test users created during testing: E2E_tc7dk5, Flw_zsn8cp, ChatDbg_fcc4ln, T3_zcc32q (all with 'duelo_user_id' key in localStorage)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created for social testing with unique pseudos using random suffixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player Social Suite fully tested. Backend APIs: player search (with filters), player profile, player follow/unfollow, chat send, chat messages, chat conversations, unread count - all working. Frontend: Players tab with search/messages tabs, player profile page with action buttons (Play/Follow/Message), chat page with message bubbles - all working. The send button requires clicking via coordinates in automated tests due to React Native Web's handling of TouchableOpacity events. User must be logged in (user ID in localStorage) for chat to work.

Player Social Suite.GET /api/players/search: ✓ Returns player list with filters (q, category, country, limit)
Player Social Suite.GET /api/player/{user_id}/profile: ✓ Returns full public profile with categories, champion titles, posts, followers/following counts
Player Social Suite.POST /api/chat/send: ✓ Send message with validation (empty, >500 chars, self-message all return 400)
Player Social Suite.GET /api/chat/{user_id}/messages?with_us: ✓ Get messages between users, marks received as read
Player Social Suite.GET /api/chat/conversations/{user_id}: ✓ Get conversation list with last message preview and unread count

frontend_flows_tested: Player search with category filters (Séries TV, Géographie, Histoire)
Player card display (pseudo, title, XP, matches, level badge)
Player profile page (avatar, stats, action buttons, publications wall)
Message button navigation to chat screen
Chat screen with message input and send button
Message sending and display (purple bubble on right)

test_categories.player_search: 3 tests - search with no filters, with query, with category filter
test_categories.player_profile: 3 tests - success, with viewer_id, not found (404)
test_categories.player_follow: 3 tests - follow success, unfollow toggle, self-follow fails
test_categories.chat_send: 4 tests - success, empty fails, too long fails, self-message fails
test_categories.chat_messages: 2 tests - get messages, messages marked as read
test_categories.chat_conversations: 2 tests - get list, unread count per conversation
test_categories.chat_unread_count: 2 tests - get count, empty for new user

key_validations: Player search displays results with correct structure
Player profile shows all required elements
Messages tab shows empty state correctly
